query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN m.status = 'sent' THEN 'msg_also_sent'
    ELSE CONCAT('msg_is_', m.status)
  END AS category,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM wa_conversations wc
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT m2.sessionId, m2.remoteJid, m2.status
  FROM messages m2
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT sessionId, remoteJid, MAX(id) AS maxId
    FROM messages
    WHERE fromMe = 1
    GROUP BY sessionId, remoteJid
  ) latest ON m2.id = latest.maxId
) m ON wc.sessionId = m.sessionId AND wc.remoteJid = m.remoteJid
WHERE wc.lastFromMe = 1 AND wc.lastStatus = 'sent'
GROUP BY category

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN m.status = 'sent' THEN 'msg_also_sent'
    ELSE CONCAT('msg_is_', m.status)
  END AS category,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM wa_conversations wc
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT m2.sessionId, m2.remoteJid, m2.status
  FROM messages m2
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT sessionId, remoteJid, MAX(id) AS maxId
    FROM messages
    WHERE fromMe = 1
    GROUP BY sessionId, remoteJid
  ) latest ON m2.id = latest.maxId
) m ON wc.sessionId = m.sessionId AND wc.remoteJid = m.remoteJid
WHERE wc.lastFromMe = 1 AND wc.lastStatus = 'sent'
GROUP BY category
